description: Dr. Andreas Kleiner from Princeton Plasma Physics Lab will present on 'The National Spherical Torus Experiment Upgrade – Advancing the Physics of Fusion Energy'. The talk will cover the NSTX experiment at Princeton Plasma Physics Laboratory, its upgrade, and research on spherical tokamak magnetic plasma confinement for fusion energy production. The presentation will discuss the advantages of spherical tokamaks, challenges in plasma management, and objectives of NSTX-U research, including the development of models to predict stability thresholds in future reactors.
title: Physics, Applied Physics & Astronomy Colloquium

description: The Robert Resnick Lecture Series presents Dr. R. Michael Barnett from Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory. The lecture will explain the mystery of dark matter, from the Big Bang to galaxies to deep underground experiments and the Large Hadron Collider. It will address what dark matter is, where to find it, and how to detect it. The talk is based on an educational planetarium show developed to engage students and science-curious adults. Reception at 3:45 PM.
title: Phantom of the Universe: The Hunt for Dark Matter

description: The event consists of a seminar from 2:00pm-3:00pm followed by a reception from 3:00pm-4:00pm. The speaker is Dr. Burak Kocuk, an associate professor in the Industrial Engineering Program at Sabanci University. The seminar will discuss a learning-based approach to predict whether a semidefinite or linear programming relaxation would produce a stronger bound for nonconvex quadratically constrained quadratic programs.
title: Learning to Relax Nonconvex Quadratically Constrained Quadratic Programs

description: This event will focus on raising awareness about breast cancer, sharing personal stories of resilience, and highlighting the importance of early detection. It will also show how women in STEM fields can overcome personal challenges and thrive in their professional lives. The event features an accomplished IBM engineer and breast cancer survivor. Join for an inspiring evening of empowerment, support, and advocacy. Refreshments will be provided!
title: Breast Cancer Awareness
